sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the T shape position and try clicking it
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'N' and node['pixels'] > 20:
        b = node['boundary']
        cr = (b[0][0] + b[2][0]) // 2
        cc = (b[0][1] + b[2][1]) // 2
        print(f"T shape: color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']} center=[{cr},{cc}]")
        # Try clicking the T shape
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': cr, 'col': cc}])
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
